title: Anna University Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant Posts
description: Anna University has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Chemical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the Anna University Notification 2026 . Here we provide more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to appl...
